query: SELECT id, title, description FROM independent_study_modules LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27SALpbbdFwiPRE.root --database kBmgeZHWTyHuceHoeAKRrp --execute SELECT id, title, description FROM independent_study_modules LIMIT 20;

rows.title: FMC Origins and Founder
rows.description: Learn about John Wesley and the Free Methodist Church founding principles

rows.title: Core Beliefs and Values
rows.description: Understand the core theological beliefs of the Free Methodist Church and how they apply to leadership

rows.title: Church Organization and Structure
rows.description: Learn how the Free Methodist Church is organized and how decisions are made

rows.title: Leadership Roles and Responsibilities
rows.description: Understand different leadership roles in the Free Methodist Church

rows.title: Wesleyan Theology: A Practical Guide
rows.description: Learn the core principles of John Wesley and Methodist theology in simple, practical language. Understand grace, sanctification, social holiness, and how to live out your faith daily.

rows.title: Introduction to Christian Doctrine
rows.description: A comprehensive introduction to core Christian doctrines in simple, practical language designed for missionaries, church planters, and lay leaders. Covers God's nature, Jesus Christ, the Holy Spirit, salvation, the Church, and eternity. Bilingual (English/Swahili) with videos and interactive quizzes. Ideal for limited English speakers and those working in missions contexts.
